{{Quote|Good Lady Kira, we are on our way to the ''Shatoon Monastery'', a hundred kilometers from here. Our old ''father'' needs rest and sustenance…can you help us?|A Dark Side Adept, to Lady Kira|<ref name="EE 2">[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]</ref>}}
The '''Shatoon Monastery''' was a religious building on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]],<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> far from [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] and one hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] from [[Kira Fortress]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]
